text.title: Docker Image Optimization (size + cache + supply chain) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the config artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required field set to null and other required fields missing.

list.item: multi_stage: must match boolean const true; otherwise reject.
runtime_base: must match enum: distroless, chainguard-wolfi, scratch; otherwise reject.
digest_pinned: must match boolean const true; otherwise reject.
user_uid: must match integer minimum 1; otherwise reject.
cache_mounts: must match boolean const true; otherwise reject.
scanners: must match array of HIGH/CRITICAL-gating scanners (hadolint, trivy, docker-scout); otherwise reject.
target_size_mb: must match integer maximum 200; otherwise reject.
